SHOPENHANCEMENT-REMOVE_BASE_COST.title: Base Cost
SHOPENHANCEMENT-REMOVE_BASE_COST.hover.d: The original price is 75 + 25*n. If you want the full original experience, you can increase it to 75.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-REMOVE_STEP_COST.title: Step Cost
SHOPENHANCEMENT-REFRESH_COST.title: Refresh Cost
SHOPENHANCEMENT-RELIC_REFRESH_MODE.title: Shop Relic Refresh Logic
SHOPENHANCEMENT-RELIC_REFRESH_MODE.hover: Vanilla Consume removes relics as soon as they are displayed (the base game's behavior). Rotation Queue returns unbought relics to the pool and avoids repeats until eligible shop relics have been seen. Fully Random also returns unbought relics, but may repeat immediately.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-ENABLE_SELL_MODE.title: Enable Sell Mode
SHOPENHANCEMENT-ENABLE_SELL_MODE.hover.d: Click the Sell Mode button in the bottom-left corner of the shop screen, then right-click a relic or potion to sell it. Note: the prices below are not the shop's buying prices, but the gold you earn when selling to the shop.
For reference: the in-game common relic price is 175; the default is roughly 40% of that.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-SELL_UNCOMMON_RELIC_PRIC: For reference: the in-game uncommon relic price is 225; the default is roughly 40% of that.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-SELL_RARE_RELIC_PRICE.ho: For reference: the in-game rare relic price is 275; the default is roughly 40% of that.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-SELL_SHOP_RELIC_PRICE.ho: For reference: the in-game shop-pool relic price is 200; the default is roughly 40% of that.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-SELL_ANCIENT_RELIC_PRICE: The game does not assign a price to ancient relics. Considering rarity and balance, the default is based on 600 at roughly 40%.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-SELL_STARTER_RELIC_PRICE: The game does not assign a price to starter relics. Considering rarity and balance, the default is based on 600 at roughly 40%.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-SELL_EVENT_RELIC_PRICE.h: The game does not assign a price to event relics. Considering rarity and balance, the default is based on 200 at roughly 40%.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-SELL_RELIC_PRICE_VARIANC: Sell price is randomly offset by up to ± the set value, calculated independently per item. 0.20 means at most ±20%; 0 disables variance.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-SELL_COMMON_POTION_PRICE: For reference: the in-game common potion price is 50; the default is roughly 40% of that.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-SELL_UNCOMMON_POTION_PRI: For reference: the in-game uncommon potion price is 75; the default is roughly 40% of that.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-SELL_RARE_POTION_PRICE.h: For reference: the in-game rare potion price is 100; the default is roughly 40% of that.
SHOPENHANCEMENT-SELL_POTION_PRICE_VARIAN: Sell price is randomly offset by up to ± the set value, calculated independently per item. 0.20 means at most ±20%; 0 disables variance.
